title: Slompack
description: A modpack for Overhauls, Performance, QoL, and a bit of magic
body:
# Slompack

A fabric modpack


**Elevating Performance to New Heights**

Tired of sluggish gameplay and lag? Slompack introduces a series of performance-enhancing mods that work seamlessly on both the client and server sides. With mods like Sodium and Lithium at your side, you'll notice smoother frame rates, reduced lag, and an overall more fluid experience.

**Revitalizing the World You Know**

Slompack isn't just about performance. Experience Minecraft like never before with immersive overhaul mods. Venture into the realms of BetterEnd and BetterNether, where the boundaries of your adventures expand beyond the horizon. But it's not just about the grand changes – we also pay attention to the little things that matter. Enjoy the ambiance of the world with the inclusion of AmbientSounds. Keep track of your hunger with AppleSkin, and master your controls with Controlling – all part of the quality-of-life enhancements that Slompack brings to your journey.

**Unleash Your Inner Architect**

Unleash your creativity in Slompack's Builders' Paradise. Say goodbye to the limitations of vanilla building blocks. We've carefully selected a range of building block mods that empower you to create architectural wonders beyond your wildest imagination. From classic styles to avant-garde designs, your base will reflect your unique vision.

**Up To Date**

You can enjoy all the enhancements and features of the latest game version while still relishing the modded experience you love.

---
### Disclaimer

It's important to note that Slompack is currently in its early stages of release. As we strive to perfect your experience, we may introduce significant changes to configurations and the list of included mods. Your feedback is invaluable in making Slompack the greatest it can be. Join us in this exciting phase of development and be part of the evolution!
